name: InfiniteHash
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN89 using the official InfiniteHash source repository and universal TaoMarketCap dashboard. The repository homepage points to infinitehash.xyz, but that deployment currently returns HTTP 402 and is not promoted as a monitored website/API surface.

gap_notes: No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.
No verified standalone static data artifact yet.

surfaces.notes: Official InfiniteHash source repository for SN89.
